subcodes.first_line: O My Name! Upon thee be My glory! A hundred thousand times alas, that the peoples of the world hearkened not to the rustling of the Supreme Pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمی علیک بهائی صد هزار حیف که اهل عالم صریر قلم اعلی را نشنیدند
subcodes.subjects: @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment, @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
